name: qa_orchestrator_agent
description: Orchestrates QA tasks and coordinates specialized testing agents — extended with OpSheet workspace agents (test_case_generator_agent)
welcomeMessage:
👋 QA orchestrator ready (OpSheet workspace)!

I can help you:
  • Create test plans from Jira stories
  • Generate Gherkin test cases with Xray integration (test_case_generator_agent)
  • Analyze defects and find root causes
  • Run API and performance tests

Try: "Generate test cases for OPS-1354"

agentSpawn.description: Inject available agents registry for dynamic delegation
